introSection: Super Wild Maus  was a wooden wild mouse roller coaster previously located at Pontchartrain Beach in New Orleans, Louisiana, United States.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Originally opened as Wild Maus up until the end of the 1967 season, after which it was renamed Super Wild Maus and got a new, larger layout. The ride's cars were imported from an unknown manufacturer in Germany.

fullText:
Super Wild Maus  was a wooden wild mouse roller coaster previously located at Pontchartrain Beach in New Orleans, Louisiana, United States.

Originally opened as Wild Maus up until the end of the 1967 season, after which it was renamed Super Wild Maus and got a new, larger layout. The ride's cars were imported from an unknown manufacturer in Germany.
